title: armeria rumelica var. adamovicii
intro: Armeria rumelica var. adamovicii is a plant species of the genus Armeria, commonly known as thyme-leaved armeria or Adamovici's thyme-leaved armeria. It is a perennial herb native to the Balkan Peninsula, known for its medicinal properties and various health benefits. The plant is used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Armeria rumelica var. adamovicii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
